decisions.briefing: Markets drifted sideways today with NASDAQ +0.1% and S&P 500 +0.2% — a quiet consolidation session with no strong directional catalyst. Cash sits at $444.94, just below the $500 threshold that would trigger new position-filling, so no new buys were opened today. All six current positions remain intact; AAOI continues to show solid bullish momentum (score 90, RSI 62.5) and sits near its entry cost, while the other holdings await their next technical catalysts.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities essentially flatlined on May 12 with the S&P 500 gaining just 0.2% and the NASDAQ adding 0.1%, reflecting an absence of meaningful macro catalysts. Trading volume appeared subdued as investors paused to digest a strong multi-week recovery rally. With no major Federal Reserve commentary or scheduled economic releases to move sentiment, the session reflected classic consolidation — buyers and sellers in rough equilibrium with neither side willing to commit aggressively.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股5月12日幾近橫盤，標普500指數微漲0.2%，那斯達克上揚0.1%，顯示市場欠缺明確方向性催化劑。在近期一輪強勁反彈後，投資者普遍觀望，靜待新的基本面訊號。聯準會官員未有重要表態，經濟數據亦屬空窗期，市場整體呈現典型的盤整格局，多空力量大致旗鼓相當，未見主動出擊的意欲。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Consolidation happens when a market or stock trades within a tight price range after a significant move, with buyers and sellers in rough balance. It often signals the market is 'catching its breath' — digesting recent gains or losses before committing to the next directional move. Traders watch consolidation phases closely because a decisive breakout in either direction typically follows.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 整理（Consolidation）是指市場或個股在大幅波動後，在相對窄幅區間橫向盤整的狀態，反映多空力道趨於均衡。此現象通常意味市場正在「消化」近期漲跌幅度，蓄勢等待下一波方向性行情。技術分析師往往密切關注整理型態，因為整理結束後往往伴隨一段明確的突破走勢，方向一旦確立便較為可觀。
